== Notes for [[Item:Q105422|Q105422]] ==

The genealogy of Jesus as given in the ''Gospel of Matthew'' says that there are 14 generations from the Exile to Jesus, but gives only 13 names. Hugh Schonfeld has identified the missing generation from a surviving Hebrew text of the gospel. The name Abner, he says, should be inserted between Abiud and Eliakim.

According to this theory Matthew 1:13 should be:

>And Zorobabel begat Abiud;
>and Abiud ''[begat '''Abner''';''
>''and Abner]'' begat Eliakim;
>and Eliakim begat Azor;

The tree will show the traditional lineage.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000015019706772

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
